Label: Can't edit listing — app user
Customer Message: Hi, I've been trying to update my boat listing for the past two days and nothing is working. Every time I make a change and hit save it just goes back to the old information. I'm really frustrated because I lowered the price and it's still showing the old price online. I'm using the app on my iPhone. Can someone please help me fix this?
AI Response:
Classification: Listing Editing & Access
Escalate: no
Reason to escalate: n/a

Subject: Fix for Listing Edits Not Saving on iPhone

---

Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry you've been frustrated with updating your listing. I have good news — this is a common issue with a straightforward fix.

**The issue:** Listings can only be edited through a web browser, not the mobile app. The app doesn't always sync changes properly, which is why your price update isn't appearing online even though you clicked save.

**Here's how to fix it:**

1. On your iPhone, open **Safari** (not the app)
2. Go to **website.com**
3. In the upper right corner, tap on your **Profile**
4. Tap **"My Listings"**
5. Scroll to your boat listing and tap the **Edit** button
6. Update the price field (or any other fields you need to change)
7. Scroll to the bottom and tap **Save**

**Important note:** It can take up to 30 minutes for your changes to appear on the site, so don't worry if you don't see the new price immediately.

Once you've made the update through Safari, your price should reflect correctly. If you continue to have trouble after following these steps, please reply with a screenshot of what you see (on iPhone, press the side button and volume up at the same time), and we'll dig deeper.

Label: Post-scam fraud — customer already sent money, wants recovery
Customer Message: I need help urgently. Someone messaged me through the platform saying they wanted to buy my boat. They asked me to take the listing down and send them my PayPal info for a deposit. I sent them $200 as a 'good faith' payment they asked for and now they've disappeared. I looked them up and I think they're a scammer. I want the company to refund me the $200 and take responsibility because this happened through your platform. What is your buyer protection policy?
AI Response:
Classification: Scam & Fake Inquiries + Billing & Payments

Escalate: yes

Reason to escalate: Customer has already sent money to a third party and is requesting a refund; this requires human agent review and documentation for potential fraud investigation.

Subject: Urgent: Suspected Scam Transaction & Refund Request

---

I'm very sorry to hear you've experienced this. I understand how frustrating and concerning this situation is, and I appreciate you reaching out right away.

I need to be direct about an important detail: **our platform does not process payments between buyers and sellers, and there is no buyer protection policy for peer-to-peer transactions.** When you sent $200 directly via PayPal outside of our platform, that transaction was between you and the recipient—not facilitated or insured by us. Because of this, we cannot issue a refund or reverse the payment ourselves.

However, this does appear to be a scam, and I'm immediately escalating your case to our support team. They will:
- Review the suspicious account and buyer profile on our platform
- Document this incident for investigation
- Help you understand next steps

**In the meantime, I strongly recommend:**
1. **Contact PayPal directly** — report the transaction as fraudulent through their Resolution Center (paypal.com). PayPal may be able to recover funds if the recipient hasn't withdrawn them yet.
2. **File a report with the FTC** at reportfraud.ftc.gov
3. **Contact your local law enforcement** if you wish to file a police report

To help our support team investigate, please provide:
- The exact email address associated with your account
- How you log in (Google / Apple / email + password)
- The name or username of the buyer who contacted you
- Any screenshots of the conversation where they asked for your PayPal info
- The date the $200 was sent

A real person from our team will follow up with you within 24 hours.
